_comment_data_source: 'rithmic' or 'cqg'. CQG uses the free AMP demo by default.

rithmic._comment_user: Your Rithmic username (email from your broker)
rithmic._comment_system: Rithmic Paper Trading Chicago (or your broker's system)

cqg._comment_user: CQG demo user (free, no account needed)

dxfeed._comment: DXFeed requires your own account. Configure in Deepchart UI: Data Sources → Add → DXFeed. Enter your credentials there. There is no free/delayed endpoint available.

license._comment: Offline license system. Place a .lic file in the Deepchart folder to activate.
